title: Chewy Q1 2021 Earnings Preview
text: Chewy Q1 2021 earnings were previewed with consensus estimates of $2.13 billion in revenue (31.5% Y/Y growth) and -$0.02 EPS. The preview highlighted the critical question facing investors: would newly acquired pandemic customers remain after reopening? Management reported adding 5.7 million net active customers in 2020, bringing the total to 19.2 million. Adjusted EBITDA was estimated at $32.3 million and gross margin at 25.7%. The company benefited from accelerated e-commerce penetration driven by pandemic lockdowns, but investors worried about customer retention as economies reopened and pets returned to pre-pandemic activity levels. The quarter represented an inflection point where investors could assess whether pandemic growth was sustainable.
